case_title: IRVING RENE SERRANO VS. MAYUMI WATANABE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SERRANO, IRVING RENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WATANABE, MAYUMI $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,060.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $100.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $126.80 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT WATANABE, MAYUMI
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SERRANO, IRVING RENE AS TO DEFENDANT WATANABE, MAYUMI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERRANO, IRVING RENE AS TO DEFENDANT WATANABE, MAYUMI
STATEMENT FROM JUDGEMENT CREDITOR REGARDING AMOUNT OF MONTHLY PAYMENTS HE IS WILLING TO ACCEPT.
STIPULATION PRO TEM COMMISSIONER: MICHELLE MCGILL FILED BY SERRANO, IRVING RENE WATANABE, MAYUMI
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERRANO, IRVING RENE PETITION MAILED ON SEP 26, 2008
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-21-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT WATANABE, MAYUMI HEARING SET FOR JUL-24-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY MAYUMI WATANABE SET FOR JUL-24-2008 IS GRANTED AND MATTER IS CONTINUED TO NOV-19-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN 506. IF NO APPEARANCE CASE IS TO BE CONTINUED IN 3 MONTH INCREMENTS UNTIL FULLY PAID IN JANUARY 2011, PER INSTALLMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR SPECIFIC TERMS.) BOTH PARTIES WERE PRESENT, NO EVIDENCE RETAINED, PRO TEM COMMISSIONER MICHELL MCGILL, DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-18-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)
OFF CALENDAR ORDER RETURNED. SENT TO DEFT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-23-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WATANABE, MAYUMI
THE MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF NOV-19-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCE(S). (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)
RETURN OF ORDER RE: TERMS SET FOR PAYMENT SET ASIDE - SENT TO MAYUMI WATANABE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WATANABE, MAYUMI
ORDER OF THE COURT TO SET ASIDE TERMS, GRANTED.
